hero.title: Discover Your Entrepreneurial DNA
hero.subtitle: AI-powered assessment across 12 scientifically-grounded dimensions. Understand your strengths, growth areas, and career readiness.

dimensions.title: 12 Dimensions
dimensions.description: Comprehensive evaluation of personality, cognitive ability, entrepreneurial traits, and interpersonal skills.

ai.title: AI-Adaptive
ai.description: Conversational assessment that adapts to your responses with unique follow-up questions.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Take the assessment in English or Hindi. More languages coming soon.

antiCheat.title: Integrity Protected
antiCheat.description: 7-layer anti-cheating system ensures authentic, reliable results.

audience.title: Who Is This For?
audience.students: Students (15-25) exploring career paths and self-awareness
audience.employers: Employers looking for candidates with the right traits

start.title: Begin Your Assessment
start.description: This assessment takes 15-25 minutes. You'll answer scenario-based questions and share your thoughts in open-ended responses.
start.consent: I understand this assessment evaluates personality traits and I consent to AI analysis of my responses.
start.languageNote: Your assessment language will be locked for this session.

rules.title: Assessment Guidelines
rules.noBackNav: You cannot go back to previous questions
rules.noTimeLimit: There are soft time guides but no hard cutoffs
rules.honest: There are no right or wrong answers — be authentic
rules.noCopying: Copy-paste is disabled during the assessment

session.sjtInstruction: Read the scenario and rank the options from most to least preferred.
session.freeTextInstruction: Share your thoughts in detail. Be specific and authentic.

complete.title: Assessment Complete!
complete.description: Your responses are being analyzed. Your personalized report will be ready shortly.

report.title: Your Assessment Report
report.commitmentFlagDescription: Your stated ambitions score high, but behavioral indicators suggest follow-through may be a challenge. This is an area for focused development.
report.disclaimer: This assessment provides insights for self-reflection and development. Results should be considered alongside other factors in career decisions.

astro.title: AstroCareer
astro.subtitle: Explore career paths through the lens of Vedic astrology and numerology.
astro.disclaimer: AstroCareer insights are for guidance and self-reflection only. Career success depends on your skills, effort, and choices — not planetary positions.

quick.title: Quick Analysis
quick.description: Enter your name and date of birth for numerology-based career insights.

full.title: Full Kundli Analysis
full.description: Enter complete birth details for a comprehensive Vedic astrological career analysis.

dashboard.noAssessments: You haven't taken any assessments yet.
dashboard.behavioralDesc: Evaluate your personality, cognitive traits, and entrepreneurial readiness across 12 dimensions.
dashboard.domainDesc: Test your technical knowledge in your field of study with adaptive questions.
dashboard.aiCollabDesc: Solve a real-world problem by collaborating with an AI assistant. We evaluate how effectively you work with AI.
dashboard.astroDesc: Explore career paths through Vedic astrology and numerology.
dashboard.preCollegeNote: Based on your profile, AstroCareer is available for career exploration. Other assessments unlock when you enter college.
dashboard.completeOnboarding: Complete your profile to see available assessments.

onboarding.description: We need a few details to personalize your experience.
onboarding.step2Description: This helps us show you the right assessment modules.
onboarding.step3Description: Tell us about your academic journey so far.
onboarding.dobHelp: Your age helps us suggest the right educational stage.
onboarding.educationalStageLabel: Where are you in your education?

stageDesc.PRE_COLLEGE: Just passed 10th or 12th, exploring career options
stageDesc.COLLEGE: Currently pursuing a degree (1st to final year)

onboarding.backlogHelp: Enter 0 if you have no backlogs. This is confidential.

domainAssessment.title: Domain Knowledge Test
domainAssessment.description: Test your technical knowledge in your field of study.
domainAssessment.aiProbe: Tell us more about your understanding...

complete.title: Domain Test Complete!
complete.description: Your domain knowledge has been evaluated.

aiCollab.title: AI Collaboration Assessment
aiCollab.description: Solve a real-world problem by collaborating with an AI assistant. We evaluate how effectively you work with AI tools.
aiCollab.typePrompt: Type your prompt to the AI assistant...
aiCollab.completeDescription: Your AI collaboration skills are being analyzed.
